title: Foundation & Utility Setup

tasks.description: Verify Node.js Brotli Support - Confirm Node.js version >=18 in package.json engines, verify built-in zlib brotli functions available, no external dependencies needed
acceptanceCriteria: Node.js version >=18 confirmed in package.json engines

tasks.description: Create Compression Utility Module - Implement compress(), decompress(), hasBrotliExtension(), compressFile(), decompressFile(), createMetadata() using Node.js built-in zlib brotli
acceptanceCriteria: compress() and decompress() functions work correctly
compressFile() and decompressFile() handle file I/O
All functions have proper error handling

tasks.description: Add Compression Constants - Add COMPRESSION_CONFIG to constants.ts with quality levels (4, 5, 6, 11), thresholds (100KB, 256KB), and file extension (.br)
acceptanceCriteria: Quality levels defined (REALTIME=4, BATCH=6, ARCHIVE=11, CACHE=5)

tasks.description: Create Compression Unit Tests - Test compress/decompress roundtrip, hasBrotliExtension(), quality levels, file operations, error handling, and compression ratios
acceptanceCriteria: Roundtrip tests for string and Buffer data
File I/O tests with temp files

notes: This is the critical path sprint. All other sprints depend on the compression utility module. Uses Node.js built-in zlib brotli - no npm packages needed. Detection uses file extension (.br) not magic bytes.
